rulings.Case Title: JESUS THOMAS SOTO VS. PETER LOUIE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Taxing Costs And Striking Costs; Memo Of Points And Authorities; Declaration; Exhibits

rulings.Case Title: DEPARTMENT OF FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING VS. GRISEZ BUCHANAN, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 21, 2018, Line 2. CROSS DEFENDANTS KEVIN KISH, DEPARTMENT OF FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT. Continued to May 10, 2018. Plaintiff to respond in good faith to Defendant's meet and confer efforts. Plaintiff to file a declaration outlining the result of the meet and confer efforts no later than April 20, 2018. If, as a result of meet and confer efforts, supplemental briefing is necessary parties to each file a supplemental brief, not to exceed 3 pages, no later than April 27, 2018. If Plaintiff chooses to file an amended complaint as a result of the meet and confer, such amended complaint shall be filed no later than April 23, 2018. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AR CAPITAL MANAGEMENT INC VS. MARIO ANGEL GUTIERREZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Mario Angel Gutierrez; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 21, 2018, Line 4. PLAINTIFF AR CAPITAL MANAGEMENT INC'S Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Mario Angel Gutierrez. GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses without objections within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $960. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH IMBELLONI VS. SAN FRANCISCO AUTO REPAIR CENTER, INC. ET AL
